lineage.method: v_alpha_v1_lsk3 11-factor + M2.3 F62 settlement_cycle_premium_60d (per-subject pre-settlement-hour drift in 1h perp returns, 60d rolling). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

f62_admission_2026_04_29.settlement_window_interpretation: PRE-settlement (1h before each UTC 0/8/16 settlement). Doc E.10 mechanism: longs unwind to avoid funding payment → systematic drift down at pre-settlement hour.

post_panel_merge_admission.context: After merging settlement_cycle_panel into the cross-sectional features panel via build_cross_sectional_feature_bundle, NaN values for non-1h-data subjects (~70 of 99) get filled with 0 by the bundle's final fillna step (features.py:629). The cross-sectional rank IC therefore gets dampened by the 0-mass.

f62_admission_2026_04_29.weight_calibration: Initial weight = -0.024 (post-merge raw IC) × 3.25 (v91 |w|/|IC| ratio) ≈ -0.08 (sign negative). Subject to weight scan against walk-forward + regime gates.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: M2.3 v5 score: extends v_alpha_v1_lsk3 by adding F62 settlement_cycle_premium_60d (rolling 60d mean of 1h perp log return at pre-settlement hours UTC 23/7/15 minus mean at other hours, per subject). Doc §E.10 mechanism: longs unwind to avoid funding payment → systematic drift down at pre-settlement hour. Cross-sectionally, assets with stronger pre-settlement unwind pressure UNDERPERFORM in the next 5 days (more crowded with funding-arbitrage capital). Sign empirical: NEGATIVE (LONG low-pressure / SHORT high-pressure). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Score adds -0.08 * z(settlement_cycle_premium_60d). Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.3 below v_alpha_v1_lsk3_g_v2 (+2.147) without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.0 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3); OR (c) doc E.10 universe-mean settlement-vs-non-settlement t-stat falls below 2.0 on this panel.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) -0.08*z(settlement_cycle_premium_60d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: SP-C Phase 3: v5 (lsk3 + F62) at h10d under v10_h10d contract.
